summary: Comprehensive testing of App Studio feature. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All critical UI elements verified - sidebar, project creation, tabs, chat with AI Producer, features marketplace, build functionality, preview iframe.

issues: Console shows 'Error fetching stats: TypeError: Failed to fetch' - appears to be from ClientDashboard component, does not affect App Studio functionality

critical_code_review_comments: App Studio backend module correctly implements all required endpoints
AI Producer chat uses OpenAI gpt-4o with tool-calling (8 tools available)
Build engine generates real PWA/Hybrid/Native/FullStack code packages
Owner bypasses credit deductions as expected
Build files served publicly without auth (as designed for iframe preview)
Frontend correctly implements 3-pane UI with sidebar, chat, and summary panel
Tool pills render in chat (expandable with args/result)
Features tab shows all 20 features grouped by 5 categories with Add buttons
Preview tab shows iframe with generated PWA after build

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements present, chat flow works, build generates preview)

seed_data_creation: Created test projects during testing (cleaned up automatically)
context_for_next_testing_agent: App Studio feature fully tested. Key findings: (1) GET /api/app-studio/options returns 4 project types and 20 features, (2) POST /api/app-studio/projects/create creates fullstack project correctly, (3) GET /api/app-studio/projects/{id} returns project + features list, (4) POST /api/app-studio/producer-chat works with AI tool-calling - AI suggested features in Arabic, (5) POST /api/app-studio/feature/add works with credit deduction (owner bypasses), (6) Duplicate feature returns 409, (7) POST /api/app-studio/build/{id} generates 5+ files with preview_url and zip_url, (8) GET /api/app-studio/build/{id}/index.html serves HTML publicly (200 OK), (9) GET /api/app-studio/build/{id}/bundle.zip serves zip (200 OK, application/zip), (10) GET /api/app-studio/importable lists freebuild_site and mobile_app artifacts, (11) GET /api/app-studio/conversation/{id} returns message history, (12) DELETE /api/app-studio/conversation/{id} resets conversation, (13) DELETE /api/app-studio/projects/{id} deletes project + features, (14) Frontend /chat/app-studio loads with sidebar showing projects, (15) New project modal has type selection (PWA/Hybrid/Native/FullStack), (16) Tabs work (chat/features/preview/imports), (17) Chat input + send button + quick prompts present, (18) Features tab shows 5 categories with Add buttons, (19) Build button triggers build and enables preview tab, (20) Preview iframe shows generated PWA

features_verified.backend_options_4_types: ✅ GET /api/app-studio/options returns 4 project types (pwa, hybrid, native, fullstack)
features_verified.backend_serve_html_public: ✅ GET /api/app-studio/build/{id}/index.html serves HTML (200 OK, no auth)
features_verified.backend_fullstack_components: ✅ Fullstack build generates frontend/, backend/, admin/, marketing/
features_verified.frontend_new_project_modal: ✅ New project modal with type selection
features_verified.frontend_tabs: ✅ All 4 tabs present (chat, features, preview, imports)
features_verified.frontend_chat_input: ✅ Chat input and send button present
features_verified.frontend_features_categories: ✅ 5 feature categories displayed (core, screen, money, addon, ai)
features_verified.frontend_summary_panel: ✅ Summary panel with build button present
features_verified.frontend_build_works: ✅ Build button triggers build, download button appears

mocked_apis.note: All integrations are live (OpenAI GPT-4o for AI Producer, real code generation)
